notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed package describes events that are largely public/visible (Fang Yuan collecting Luopo Valley, Feng Xian Taizi evacuating Zhao Lianyun, Zhao Lianyun inheriting Dao Tian's inheritance). Most entity descriptions and relations are marked 'ambiguous' but the source quotes describe observable events rather than private knowledge, secret plans, or future-known information. No directly supported hidden fact with clear whoKnows/whoDoesNotKnow distinction can be extracted from the provided pointers without speculation.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed shows behaviors (回风子战败投降，看守落魄谷，通报凤仙太子) but no clear observed motive is directly stated. His actions could be due to coercion (受制于人) rather than any personal motive. Inferring motive would be a psychological leap without direct source support.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed contains mostly individual actors (回风子, 凤仙太子, 黑楼兰, 赵怜云, 方源, 黎山仙子, 焚天魔女, 雪胡老祖) without clear collective faction/group stakes. 中洲十大古派势力 is mentioned as controlling 回风子 but no concrete pressure axis or likely reaction can be derived from the seed facts alone. 影宗 is mentioned in a relation but only as a CONFLICT relation with 方源 regarding inheritance, with no further detail. No named collective actor has a concrete stake that can be turned into a faction pressure candidate with conservative one-step reactions.
IF export filter quarantined 10 legacy old-schema branches.
